config.neo4j.cypher.topic.diffusers.cpg.edges.v: WITH __value AS evt MERGE (source:CPGNode {id: evt.edge.source_id}) ON CREATE SET source.placeholder = true, source.created_at = datetime() MERGE (target:CPGNode {id: evt.edge.target_id}) ON CREATE SET target.placeholder = true, target.created_at = datetime() MERGE (source)-[r:$(evt.edge.edge_type) {id: evt.edge.id}]->(target) ON CREATE SET r.created_at = datetime() SET r.edge_type = evt.edge.edge_type, r.ordinal = evt.edge.ordinal, r.field = evt.edge.field, r.child_index = evt.edge.child_index, r.variable = evt.edge.variable, r.called_name = evt.edge.called_name, r.repository = evt.repository, r.commit_hash = evt.commit_hash, r.file_id = evt.file_id, r.file_path = evt.file_path, r.content_hash = evt.content_hash, r.schema_version = evt.schema_version, r.event_type = evt.event_type, r.updated_at = datetime()
